basics.name: Tarikul Islam
basics.label: Lead Engineer, SmartThings Development Group
basics.summary: Lead Engineer building AI-driven mobile and IoT products, with a focus on Generative AI, LLMs, computer vision, and software engineering.

work.summary: Leading the design and development of SmartThings features and AI-driven experiences.
highlights: Led development of the Plant Care Plugin, including SmartThings integration and a standalone Android app.
Integrated Siri voice assistant and contributed to AI-driven features within SmartThings.
Mentored engineers to strengthen ML and AI expertise.

work.position: Senior Software Engineer, Service Experience Group
work.summary: Modernized SmartThings automation and improved testing reliability.
highlights: Migrated the Automation Module from ReactiveSwift to Combine.
Boosted unit test coverage from 20% to 80%.
Resolved memory leaks and performance bottlenecks.

work.summary: Built and maintained core features in the SmartThings Automation module.
highlights: Designed, developed, and maintained key automation features.
Collaborated across teams to deliver reliable mobile experiences.

work.summary: Mentoring engineers in foundational AI concepts and internal upskilling.
highlights: Mentored 30+ team members in AI fundamentals.
Helped design the SRBD Quarterly AI Basics Exam 2025 syllabus and evaluations.

education.institution: Bangladesh University of Engineering and Technology (BUET)
education.area: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Engineering

publications.name: Lens Ghosting Detection Using IMU Sensor Data in Smartphones
publications.summary: Patent granted in 2024 and published globally in 2026 for an IMU-assisted approach to detect and mitigate lens ghosting artifacts in smartphone cameras.

publications.name: Software Engineering Practices in Bangladesh
publications.publisher: Bangladesh University of Engineering and Technology (Undergrad Thesis)
publications.summary: Undergraduate thesis analyzing industry practices, standards alignment, and growth opportunities.

portfolio.name: Plant Care Plugin for SmartThings
portfolio.description: Led design and development of a SmartThings Plant Care Plugin, including SmartThings integration and a standalone Android app.

portfolio.name: TMS: Toddler Monitoring System
portfolio.description: AI-powered monitoring system for IoT surveillance devices with real-time alerts using SlowFast, YOLOv5, and Deep SORT.

portfolio.name: AI Notifications in SmartThings
portfolio.description: Proposed AI-generated notifications using vision-language models; accepted for HQ development.
